2304470.name: Ascension X
2304470.description:
Templar soldiers unite to rescue what is left from an Apocalyptic Earth!


Our objective is to achieve peace on Earth, develop the civilization on Mars, and explore new planets!

Our Holy Emperor , was forced to become the Free World leader, after evil corporations destroyed many countries.

You play as Captain Phillips, who has under his command a squad of brave warriors, that risk their lives to save the innocent civilians victims of corrupted politicians and corporations.

You will start helping restore stability on Earth, to later help mankind on Mars, and also explore the closest planetary system from our own!

Join The Templars in this new exciting Sci Fi Adventure, Ascension X!

Features In Game:

  • Futuristic Weapons and Grenades.
  • Amazing Big Mecha, Robots and Monsters!
  • Apocalyptic Maps On A Sci Fi Future Earth
  • Zombies, rebels, evil corporations and aliens as enemies
  • Decimate your enemies with advanced rifles with 100 round magazines
  • New allies from the stars that will help you explore new worlds.
  • Maps on Mars.
  • Exploration of new solar systems.
  • Alien technology will help you achieve your goals on every planet your alliance conquers.
  • Liberation of innocent life forms in other planets occupied by evil aliens.

    and Much More!!!



    The story, all names, characters, and incidents portrayed in this production are fictitious. No identification with actual persons (living or deceased), places, buildings, and products is intended or should be inferred. Ascension X by Carlos M Martinez ©2023 © all rights reserved.
